name: Condemnation: Mute

effects.text: put this card on this vampire

text:
+1 stealth action. Condemnation.
[chi] Ⓓ Lock a younger vampire.
[dai] Requires an infernal vampire. Ⓓ Put this card on a ready vampire. The attached vampire gets -3 votes. Burn all other condemnation cards on this minion.
[DAI] As [dai] above, and the attached vampire burns 1 blood after a referendum passes.
